title: Suvendu Adhikari’s net worth: No car, no gold, just ₹12,000 cash declared by BJP’s first Bengal CM taking oath today
description: Suvendu Adhikari’s net worth: In the election affidavit filed before contesting the West Bengal Election 2026, Suvendu Adhikari has declared a net worth of ₹85.87 lakh. This includes ₹24.57 lakh in movable assets and ₹61.30 lakh in immovable assets, as per the affidavit.
